creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
> >
> > Please test again by using:
> > make install MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes
> >
> There is no change with this option. I have tested several times.
> 
> 
> > How many CUPs/Cores has your server?
> >
> 
> It has only one CUP/Core.

Do you have anything in /etc/libmap.conf
Maybe the treading libs might be used inconsistently.

The Problem may be related in shell, or mkdir.
Try to remove gmkdir, so graphviz uses the FreeBSD one.

kind regards Dirk
